flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Arlington Baptist University rose 37% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $20.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Arlington Baptist University rose 37% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $20.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 16 pp at Arlington Baptist University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.5% vs 20.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Arlington Baptist University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (22.9% → 19.4%).
